problem.title: CT-ICP refinement gate with gated map updates on KITTI Odometry 07 (full)
problem.question: Does skipping voxel-map updates on gate rollback make the gate viable (no map contamination)?

variants.label: prior best: tune-v1 + multi-scale + DENSE_NORMAL_CHOLESKY (no gate)
variants.intent: Compare against the established arch-2 best.

variants.label: tune-v1 + gate (with gated map updates)
variants.intent: Re-test gate now that map updates skip on rollback.

variants.label: tune-v1 + paper-arch bundle (with gated map updates)
variants.intent: Apply gate + multi-scale + cholesky bundle; gate now skips map update on rollback.

variants.label: paper-arch with loose gate (3m, 0.4 rad) + gated map updates
variants.intent: Wider gate to reduce false-positives, while gated map prevents contamination.

variants.label: paper-arch with tight gate (1m, 0.15 rad) + gated map updates
variants.intent: Tighten gate to reject more outliers; gated map prevents contamination.
